text.title: llamaindex-production-gotchas Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for llamaindex-production-gotchas as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Calling SubQuestionQueryEngine.query() in a FastAPI async endpoint without asyncio.run_in_executor.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Blocks the event loop. All other concurrent requests queue behind this one call. Under load, p99 latency spikes to seconds even for fast queries.

failure-mode.description: Tool function raises an unhandled exception on failure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ReActAgent catches the exception but the agent sees a generic error with no context. It typically retries the same call with the same parameters, hitting max_iterations and returning an unhelpful response.
